locationIntro:
Looking to sell your house fast in Greenwich? Sell My House Fast Greenwich is the Royal Borough's leading cash property buyer, offering guaranteed purchases with completion in as little as 7 days. We buy homes across every neighbourhood in the Royal Borough of Greenwich — from the historic heart of Greenwich Town and the elegant streets of Blackheath to the riverside developments of Thamesmead and the family-friendly roads of Eltham. Whether you own a period conversion near the Cutty Sark, a terraced house in Woolwich, or a modern apartment overlooking the O2 Arena, we'll make you a fair cash offer within 24 hours with absolutely no obligation to proceed.

With average house prices in the SE10 area sitting at around £430,000, the Greenwich property market remains one of South East London's most dynamic. But traditional sales through estate agents can still take 4-6 months, with no guarantee of completion. Our cash buying service eliminates this uncertainty entirely. We fund all purchases with our own capital — there are no mortgages to arrange, no chains to manage, and no risk of your sale collapsing at the last moment. We cover all legal fees, require no repairs or viewings, and give you complete control over your completion date. Thousands of homeowners across South East London have discovered the benefits of selling to a cash buyer, and our Greenwich team is ready to show you how straightforward the process can be.

whySellFast.heading: Skip the Months of Waiting in Greenwich's Competitive Market
whySellFast.body: Greenwich's property market is vibrant but unpredictable. Properties listed through estate agents in the SE10 and surrounding postcodes typically take 4-6 months to reach completion, assuming the sale proceeds smoothly. Factor in the possibility of chain collapses, mortgage rejections, and buyer cold feet — which affect roughly one in three sales nationally — and you could be waiting far longer. By selling to a cash buyer, you bypass all these risks. We have funds ready to deploy, our solicitors work at speed, and we can complete your purchase in as little as 7 days. Whether your property is in Charlton or Plumstead, the certainty we offer is unmatched.

whySellFast.heading: Zero Fees — Keep Every Penny of Your Offer
whySellFast.body: Selling a Greenwich property through a traditional estate agent involves significant costs. On a property worth £430,000, agent commissions of 1.5-2% plus VAT could cost you £7,700-£10,300. Add solicitor fees of £1,500-£2,500, an EPC at £80-£120, and any repairs demanded by buyers following surveys, and you could easily spend £12,000-£15,000 before you receive a penny. When you sell to Sell My House Fast Greenwich, there are no fees whatsoever. We cover all legal costs, we pay for our own assessments, and the offer price is the price you receive. It's a genuinely transparent process for homeowners across the Royal Borough.

whySellFast.heading: Any Condition, Any Situation — We'll Buy It
whySellFast.body: One of the greatest advantages of selling to a cash buyer in Greenwich is that we purchase properties regardless of condition. Whether your home is a beautifully maintained Victorian house in Blackheath or a property needing complete refurbishment in Plumstead, we'll make you a fair offer based on its current state. There's no need to spend money on repairs, decorating, or staging for viewings. We've bought properties with structural issues, damp problems, outdated electrics, and every other condition imaginable. We've also helped homeowners in every kind of situation — divorce, probate, financial difficulty, relocation — always with professionalism and sensitivity.
